info.name: Grow Up More — Phase 4: User Profiles
info.description: Phase 4 endpoints: User Profiles (with photo uploads), Education, Experience, Social Media, Skills, Languages, Documents (with file uploads), Projects.

item.name: User Profiles
item.description: User profile management with multipart photo uploads

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Jane",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "bio": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "phone": "+1-555-0123",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-15",
  "gender": "female",
  "address": "123 Main St",
  "city": "San Francisco",
  "state": "CA",
  "postalCode": "94103",
  "country": "United States"
}

request.description: Update your own profile (safe fields only)
Create a user profile for another user (admin+)

item.name: POST / (create profile with photos - admin multipart)

request.description: Get a user profile by ID (self or admin)
Update a profile by ID (self or admin)
Hard delete a user profile (super-admin only)
Get your education record by ID
Create education record for another user (admin+)
Create your own work experience record

item.name: User Documents
item.description: User document management with file uploads

formdata.description: Document file (PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG, max 5 MB)
